author: mehdi.aouadi
content:
I just published a Teku docker image under `ethpandaops/teku:focil` with a working impl of Teku on top of Heze. I managed to run an interop with Lodestar and the chain was finalising (both using Besu as EL). Here's the kurtosis config I used:
```yaml
participants:
  - el_type: besu
    el_image: ethpandaops/besu:focil
    cl_type: lodestar
    cl_image: ethpandaops/lodestar:focil
    count: 2
  - el_type: besu
    el_image: ethpandaops/besu:focil
    cl_type: teku
    cl_image: ethpandaops/teku:focil
    count: 2

network_params:
  preset: minimal
  gloas_fork_epoch: 1
  heze_fork_epoch: 2

spamoor_params:
  image: ethpandaops/spamoor:master
  spammers: []

additional_services:
  - dora
  - spamoor

dora_params:
  image: bbusa/dora:focil

port_publisher:
  additional_services:
    enabled: true
    public_port_start: 30000
```

author: jih2nn
content:
When I tried an interop between Besu and Ethrex, both complain BAL mismatch (note that logs below are not about the same block):

Ethrex:
```
[el-4-ethrex-teku] 2026-05-14T17:18:36.813082Z  WARN Error executing block: BAL validation failed for tx 100: account 0x4d1cb4eb7969f8806e2caac0cbbb71f88c8ec413 balance mismatch at index 101: BAL=999989746926169423953534537, exec=999989746926909362619060425
```

Besu
```
[el-2-besu-teku] 2026-05-14 17:19:59.790+0000 | EthScheduler-Services-16 | ERROR | MainnetBlockAccessListValidator | Block access list hash mismatch, calculated: 0x508ab758de04cbbb62de378c0e722dd756f81261d36150aab49ed64e8a1e5c45 header: 0x36e489478777a1c93dc3ec67b8d50a111268bf10af0c0fa8ef8956b1ff998f8f
```

Maybe it needs some rebase? cc <@741651225576996935> <@281967554572976128>

author: jih2nn
content:
This config should be good for reproduction:

```
participants_matrix:
  el:
    - el_type: besu
      el_image: ethpandaops/besu:focil
    - el_type: ethrex
      el_image: ethpandaops/ethrex:focil
  cl:
    - cl_type: lodestar
      cl_image: ethpandaops/lodestar:focil
    - cl_type: teku
      cl_image: ethpandaops/teku:focil
network_params:
  gloas_fork_epoch: 1
  heze_fork_epoch: 2
  preset: minimal
additional_services:
  - dora
  - tx_fuzz
  - spamoor
dora_params:
  image: bbusa/dora:focil
port_publisher:
  additional_services:
    enabled: true
    public_port_start: 65500
spamoor_params:
  spammers:
    - scenario: eoatx
      config:
        throughput: 100
    - scenario: uniswap-swaps
      config:
        throughput: 100
    - scenario: blob-combined
      config:
        throughput: 5
```
